# desec_records (Data Source)

Retrieves the list of DNS Resource Record Sets (RRsets) within a deSEC domain, with optional filtering by subname or type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all RRsets in a domain
data "desec_records" "all" {
  domain = "example.com"
}

output "all_record_types" {
  value = [for r in data.desec_records.all.records : "${r.subname}/${r.type}"]
}

# Filter by subname — all records for the www subdomain
data "desec_records" "www" {
  domain  = "example.com"
  subname = "www"
}

# Filter by record type — all A records regardless of subname
data "desec_records" "all_a" {
  domain = "example.com"
  type   = "A"
}

# Filter by both subname and type
data "desec_records" "www_a" {
  domain  = "example.com"
  subname = "www"
  type    = "A"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name to list records for.

### Optional

- `subname` (String) Filter records by this subname. Leave unset to return records for all subnames.
- `type` (String) Filter records by this record type (e.g. `A`, `AAAA`, `TXT`). Leave unset to return all types.

### Read-Only

- `records` (Attributes List) List of RRsets matching the filter criteria. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--records))

<a id="nestedatt--records"></a>
### Nested Schema for `records`

Read-Only:

- `created` (String) Timestamp of RRset creation.
- `domain` (String) The domain name.
- `name` (String) The full DNS name.
- `records` (Set of String) The set of record content strings.
- `subname` (String) The subdomain part.
- `touched` (String) Timestamp of last touch.
- `ttl` (Number) The TTL in seconds.
- `type` (String) The DNS record type.
